title: potentilla centigrana
intro: Potentilla centigrana, also known as Centaury or Centaurea, is a perennial plant in the rose family native to Europe. The plant contains flavonoids, phenolic acids, and saponins, which give it medicinal properties such as anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Potentilla centigrana has been used to treat various health issues, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive problems, providing benefits like reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The plant is traditionally prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are also used in traditional medicine to promote overall well-being.
